title: legubiao/quadruped_ros2_control
abstract:
ROS2-Control implementations for Quadruped robots, include sim2real

# Quadruped ROS2 Control This repository contains the ros2-control based controllers for the quadruped robot. * [Controllers](controllers): contains the ros2-control controllers * [Commands](commands): contains command node used to send command to the controller * [Descriptions](descriptions): contains the urdf model of the robot * [Hardwares](hardwares): contains the ros2-control hardware interface for the robot > **Warning:** Default branch was developed under ROS2 Jazzy. For ROS2 Humble, please check out **humble** branch. Todo List: - [x] **[2025-02-23]** Add Gazebo Playground - [x] OCS2 controller for Gazebo Simulation - [x] Refactor FSM and Unitree Guide Controller - [x] **[2025-03-30]** Add Real Go2 Robot Support - [x] **[2025-05-20]** Isaac Sim Support - [ ] OCS2 Perceptive locomotion demo Video on Real Unitree Go2 Robot: [ ](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1QpZaY8EYV/) ## 1. Quick Start * rosdep * Compile the package ### 1.1 Mujoco Simulator or Real Unitree Robot > **Warning:** CycloneDDS ROS2 RMW may conflict with unitree_sdk2. If you cannot launch unitree mujoco simulation > without `sudo`, then you cannot used `unitree_mujoco_hardware`. This conflict could be solved by one of below two > methods: > 1. Uninstall CycloneDDS ROS2 RMW, used another ROS2 RMW, such as FastDDS **[Recommended]**. > 2. Follow the guide in [unitree_ros2](https://github.com/unitreerobotics/unitree_ros2) to configure the ROS2 RMW by compiling cyclone dds. * Compile Unitree Hardware Interfaces * Follow the guide in [unitree_mujoco](https://github.com/legubiao/unitree_mujoco) to launch the unitree mujoco go2 simulation * Launch the ros2-control * Run the keyboard control node ### 1.3 Gazebo Harmonic Simulator * Install Gazebo * Compile Gazebo Playground * Launch the ros2-control * Run the keyboard control node For more details, please refer to the [unitree guide controller](controllers/unitree_guide_controller/) and [go2 description](descriptions/unitree/go2_description/). ## What's
abstract_zh: 本仓库提供了基于ROS2-Control的四足机器人控制器实现，包含仿真到实物的迁移。内容包括：控制器、命令节点、URDF模型描述以及硬件接口。默认分支基于ROS2 Jazzy开发，ROS2 Humble用户请切换到humble分支。已支持Gazebo仿真、OCS2控制器、FSM重构、Unitree Guide控制器、真实Go2机器人以及Isaac Sim。未来计划包括OCS2感知运动演示。快速启动指南涵盖Mujoco仿真、真实Unitree机器人以及Gazebo Harmonic仿真。
tldr_zh: 四足机器人ROS2控制框架，支持仿真到实物迁移。
cover_zh: 四足机器人控制新方案｜从仿真到实物一键迁移

judge.reason: 四足机器人ROS2控制框架，支持sim2real，含OCS2控制器和真机部署
